summary: E2E validation of the new 'Turma' (class_id) filter on /admin/bolsa-familia (BolsaFamilia). Both backend (8 pytest cases) and frontend (Playwright) passed 100%. Filter correctly narrows the student list, resets when school changes, and is propagated to the PDF endpoint URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: in BolsaFamilia.js the <label> for Turma uses both 'block' and 'flex' utility classes simultaneously; works due to Tailwind precedence but is mildly redundant.
Backend bolsa_familia.py is ~1325 lines — exceeds the 700-line rule. Consider splitting (stats/snapshots/PDF/CRUD) into smaller modules in a follow-up refactor. Not a blocker.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded school 220d4022-... with 4 BF students across 3 classes (2 Ano, 6 ANO A, 9 ano) + AEE (0 BF).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BF Turma filter feature is fully validated end-to-end. Backend regression test lives at /app/backend/tests/test_bf_class_filter.py and can be re-run anytime. School 220d4022-ec5e-4fb6-86fc-9233112b87b2 has 4 BF students distributed: CLASS_2ANO(1), CLASS_6ANO(2), CLASS_9ANO(1), CLASS_AEE(0). Note: frontend dropdown labels classes as 'name — grade_level', e.g. '6º ANO A — 6º ANO'.
verified_flows: GET /api/bolsa-familia/pdf/{sid}?class_id=... returns filtered PDF (200) or 404 when 0 BF students in turma with detail 'Nenhum aluno com Bolsa Família encontrado nesta turma'
Dropdown bf-class-filter disabled until school chosen
classesAPI.list(school_id) populates dropdown with 'Todas as turmas (N)' placeholder
Selecting/clearing a class refetches student list (4→2→4→0)
Generate PDF button URL includes class_id query param when class is selected
